composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in 'app.py' for the 'CarRental' web application.
- Ensure all routing and data handling for the nine pages are correctly implemented as per the requirements.
- Maintain the website accessible on local port 5000, starting at '/' route (Dashboard page).
- Fix any backend issues related to data reading/writing and routing.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 by providing stable and correct backend routes and data APIs for frontend integration.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop and complete the frontend template file 'dashboard.html' for the 'CarRental' web application.
- Implement the Dashboard page UI with all specified elements and IDs  'dashboard-page', 'featured-vehicles', 'search-vehicles-button', 'my-reservations-button', 'promotions-section'.
- Ensure the template integrates correctly with the backend route '/' and displays dynamic data passed from the backend.
- Follow the UI and interaction requirements as per the original task.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure the frontend uses the backend routes and data correctly.
